panels.description: Medium close-up of a young Caucasian man with piercing blue eyes and light stubble, sitting in a dark, muddy battlefield trench, looking down intently as he folds a white origami paper, dim lantern light casting soft shadows on his focused face.

Suddenly jerking his head up, the man gasps with mouth open, eyes wide and staring directly into the camera; the dim lantern light accentuates his startled expression, muddy trench walls slightly blurred as camera dollies closer.

Extreme close-up isolating the man's intense, wide blue eyes and open mouth as the camera swiftly rack-focuses to blur the muddy trench walls completely, highlighting the emotional shock in the dim candlelight.

caption_summary: Young man in a dark battlefield trench folds origami then suddenly gasps staring startlingly into the camera as lighting and focus emphasize his shock.
